derivation_note: Ground-plane values below are estimated by visual inspection of the plate (no camera-calibration tooling exists in this repo) -- treat as art-directed estimates, not measured facts. Recorded explicitly so a future cycle can replace this with a real vanishing-point/line detector if precision matters.

calibration.note: Trash can bottom/top sampled directly from the plate; used as the scale proxy because its apparent size at that depth is closer to Static's chibi scale than the human-height doorway also visible in the plate.

ground_plane.horizon_derivation: MEASURED (Cycle 17), replacing the Cycle-3 eyeball estimate of 205: the plate's two same-height streetlamps give H=(hn*yb_far - hf*yb_near)/(hn-hf) -- near lamp base y=470 h=340px, left lamp base y=437 h=242px -> H=355; receding awning/fence structure lines converge ~320. Adopted 330 (+/-25 uncertainty band noted). Side-by-side render comparison at the POC foot anchor confirmed the corrected scale reads better against in-scene reference objects (_test/horizon_compare.png).

light_sources.note: Nearest streetlamp cone, casts down-and-slightly-right onto the sidewalk area where the character is placed.
MONKEY sign glow, bounces warm-magenta fill light and produces the magenta puddle reflection at screen-left.
Zoo sign glow, secondary bounce fill from screen-left.

reflective_surfaces.note: Wet water-sheet on the lower-left sidewalk pavers (visible rain ripple rings in the plate). Polygon traced visually and verified by rendering an overlay against the plate (_test/puddle_poly_check.png) before use -- same estimate-then-inspect discipline as the ground-plane calibration.

atmosphere.note: Haze color SAMPLED from the plate's far-street band just below the horizon (y 335-365, x 700-900: mean [75.9, 79.8, 102.5]), not guessed. haze_max 0.55 matches how much the plate's own distant content fades.

occluders.note: Solid sidewalk trash can, traced on a 10px measurement grid (_test/trashcan_grid.png). Base sits at y=497; anything declaring behind=trashcan_left must anchor at foot_y < 497.

decompression_note: Was MZ-2026-09-02_P01_PANEL01 in the 24-panel edition; same locked beat, renumbered by the 16-page/96-panel format directive.
